tasks.name: Task 1: Create files.rs, git.rs, artifacts.rs API handler modules
tasks.notes: Created 3 handler modules with 11 total handlers. files.rs: 6 handlers (list_files, file_detail, file_content, file_diff, search_files, query_files). git.rs: 3 handlers (list_git, git_commits, session_git_commits). artifacts_api.rs: 2 handlers (session_artifacts, session_timeline). Added glob dependency to server Cargo.toml for file query pattern matching. Named artifacts_api.rs following existing export_api.rs naming convention.

tasks.name: Task 2: Register 11 new routes in build_router and update mod.rs
tasks.notes: Added module declarations for artifacts_api, files, git. Registered 11 new routes bringing total from 17 to 28. Route ordering prevents path parameter conflicts: /v1/files/search and /v1/files/query before /v1/files/{file_id}, /v1/git/commits before /v1/git/commits/{session_id}. Updated doc comments to reflect 28 endpoints across 11 groups.
